compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add --description/-d flag to ticket-create.sh and update reducer/LLM format
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Add `-d` and `--description` flag parsing to `ticket-create.sh` (same pattern as `--priority`, `--assignee`). Pass description into the CREATE event JSON `data` object. Update `_usage()` to document the new flag.

Also:
- Add `"description": ""` to initial state dict in `ticket-reducer.py` (line ~251) so the field always appears in `ticket show` output
- Add `"description": "desc"` to `KEY_MAP` in `ticket-llm-format.py` for `--format=llm` consistency

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-create.sh
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-llm-format.py

## TDD Requirement
Depends on Task d093-e5e0 (RED). All RED tests must pass (GREEN) after this implementation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ticket-create.sh help text includes --description
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket create 2>&1 | grep -qi description
- [ ] All RED tests from d093-e5e0 pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-create.sh 2>&1 | grep FAIL | wc -l  # expect 0
- [ ] LLM format maps description to 'desc'
  Verify: grep -q '"description".*"desc"' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-llm-format.py
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (RED tests from d093-e5e0) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: --description/-d flag implemented in ticket-create.sh, reducer, and LLM format. All RED tests now GREEN.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
